meaning: live pig; pig on the hoof
sentence: 市场上生猪的价格最近波动很大。
pinyin: Shìchǎng shàng shēngzhū de jiàgé zuìjìn bōdòng hěn dà.
english: The price of live pigs on the market has been fluctuating a lot recently.

sentence: 她是当红的小花，出道两年就拿了最佳新人奖。
pinyin: Tā shì dānghóng de xiǎohuā, chūdào liǎng nián jiù ná le zuìjiā xīnrén jiǎng.
english: She is a hot young actress who won the Best Newcomer award just two years after her debut.

meaning: building under construction; commercial property; real estate (for sal
sentence: 这个楼盘的位置不错，离地铁站只有五分钟。
pinyin: Zhège lóupán de wèizhi búcuò, lí dìtiě zhàn zhǐyǒu wǔ fēnzhōng.
english: This property development is well located — only five minutes from the subway station.

sentence: 她最近迷上了一部悬疑网剧，每天追更。
pinyin: Tā zuìjìn míshàng le yī bù xuányí wǎngjù, měitiān zhuī gēng.
english: She has recently become hooked on a suspense web series and follows it every day.

sentence: 他在一家大公司的人力资源部门工作了五年。
pinyin: Tā zài yī jiā dà gōngsī de rénlì zīyuán bùmén gōngzuò le wǔ nián.
english: He has worked in the human resources department of a large company for five years.
